text.title: Outcome Based Roadmaps Advanced Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding Outcome Based Roadmaps Advanced. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Business goal must be falsifiable on a date: metric + current value + target + deadline.
rule.rationale: Business goal must be falsifiable on a date: metric + current value + target + deadline.

rule.statement: Every product outcome carries a one-sentence causal hypothesis linking it upward to the business goal.
rule.rationale: Every product outcome carries a one-sentence causal hypothesis linking it upward to the business goal.

rule.statement: Every outcome has exactly one leading indicator readable weekly (not just at quarter-end).
rule.rationale: Every outcome has exactly one leading indicator readable weekly (not just at quarter-end).

rule.statement: Confidence labels replace dates everywhere except the business-goal deadline.
rule.rationale: Confidence labels replace dates everywhere except the business-goal deadline.

rule.statement: Every experiment has pre-registered success criteria written before the experiment starts.
rule.rationale: Every experiment has pre-registered success criteria written before the experiment starts.

rule.statement: Four audience artefacts (customer, board, engineering, sales) are emitted from one source tree.
rule.rationale: Four audience artefacts (customer, board, engineering, sales) are emitted from one source tree.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-outcome-based-roadmaps-advanced.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
